slug: 5G essentieel voor het verdienvermogen van Nederland
title: 5G essential for the Netherlands’ earning capacity
description: Technology, Media and Telecom (TMT) is the sector where the new economy first becomes visible. IT services, the main industry within the sector, continues to grow strongly and has emerged as a driving force in the Dutch economy. To keep contributing to the Netherlands’ earnings model, the preconditions must be in order. The first major challenge is 5G, for which the first Dutch auctions will take place this year. Unfortunately, the Netherlands is lagging behind many other countries.
author: Kasper Buiting

slug: AI is het creatieve brein van de toekomst
title: AI is the creative brain of the future
description: With shrinking research productivity and declining innovation, it is getting harder to achieve economic growth. There is hope, though: algorithms that combine existing inventions into new ones can accelerate innovation. A new Google model can now make a tasty ‘cakie’ by blending cake and biscuit recipes.
author: Kamalika Patra

slug: Advertentiemodel onder druk door nieuwe Europese wetgeving
title: Advertising model under pressure due to new European legislation
description: This article explains how the Digital Services Act will make ‘tracking’ individuals for advertising purposes more difficult and lists alternatives.
author: Julia Krauwer
Mario Bersem

slug: Advertenties lucratieve bijverdienste voor winkelketens
title: Advertising a lucrative side income for retail chains
description: Retail chains are developing their own media channels to sell advertising. This new media and advertising arm is growing at rocket speed. Read more.
author: Mario Bersem

slug: Bedrijven riskeren verlies Europese klant door cyberwet
title: Companies risk losing European customers due to cyber law
description: The Netherlands is lagging behind in implementing NIS2. Companies may face questions from Germany and Belgium, where the process is on track. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Bescherming privacy zet online adverteren op keerpunt
title: Privacy protection puts online advertising at a turning point
description: The online advertising market is exploring alternatives to personalised ads due to privacy legislation. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer
Mario Bersem

slug: Buitenreclame komt tot bloei in digitale tijdperk
title: Out-of-home advertising flourishes in the digital era
description: Discover how out-of-home advertising is growing in the digital era, with trends, figures, innovations and the role of municipalities and operators. Read more.
author: Mario Bersem

slug: Cloud en techbedrijven sterk in opmars binnen IT branche
title: Cloud and tech companies on the rise in the IT sector
description: The IT sector is among the fastest-growing sectors in the Netherlands and is also an important facilitator of digitalisation in other sectors. Despite this, little data is available on the size and economic impact of companies active in the sector and its underlying subsectors.
author: Kasper Buiting

slug: Cloud-macht ligt voorlopig buiten Europa
title: Cloud power will remain outside Europe for now
description: European cloud market dominated by US companies, local players have a small share. Europe wants control over digital services. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Corona zorgt voor tweeledig beeld telecom
title: Covid creates a mixed picture for telecoms
description: The telecoms sector is affected both positively and negatively by the coronavirus crisis. Mass homeworking is driving higher demand for corporate network services and customers use their phones more. Offsetting this is a sharp drop in roaming income due to less travel, and revenue from the business market is falling.
author: Ingrid Laane
Kamalika Patra

slug: Cyberaanval gevaarlijker door kunstmatige intelligentie
title: Cyberattacks more dangerous due to artificial intelligence
description: More than half of companies view innovations in artificial intelligence (AI) as a threat to their organisation’s cyber security.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Cyberaanval schudt ondernemer lang niet altijd wakker
title: A cyberattack does not always wake an entrepreneur up
description: Last year, almost three-quarters of Dutch companies faced a cyberattack. They only see the risks after suffering damage. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Cyberdreiging zet ondernemers aan tot maatregelen
title: Cyber threat prompts entrepreneurs to take action
description: The number of companies that have faced a cyberattack has risen sharply over the past year. Although entrepreneurs’ risk perception has stayed almost the same, research by ABN AMRO among 233 companies shows a growing willingness to take measures.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Cybermaatregelen steeds meer gericht op mensen
title: Cyber measures increasingly focused on people
description: Companies are focusing measures to increase cyber resilience more and more on human vulnerabilities. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Cyberveiligheid in de TMT-sector
title: Cybersecurity in the TMT sector
description: IT suppliers are a popular target for cybercriminals. Read more.
author: Amad Khan

slug: Cyberveiligheid kleinbedrijf cruciaal voor klantbehoud
title: Cybersecurity for small businesses is crucial to retain customers
description: With NIS2 arriving, small businesses will face critical questions from the supply chain. This has not fully sunk in yet. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: De toekomst van televisie stilzitten is geen optie
title: The future of television: sitting still is not an option
description: Television is changing at breakneck speed. For a long time, TV suffered little from the power of the internet, unlike newspapers and magazines. But that is changing.
author: Steven Peters

slug: De twee gezichten van Agentic AI wapen en schild
title: The two faces of Agentic AI: weapon and shield
description: Criminals use AI to carry out lightning-fast attacks. The urgency is growing, but many organisations do not know where to start. Read more.
author: Amad Khan

slug: De virtuele mens als commerciële kans
title: The virtual human as a commercial opportunity
description: From virtual replicas of celebrities to computer-generated social media personalities – virtual humans are popping up everywhere. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Deregulering is niet het einde van RegTech
title: Deregulation is not the end of RegTech
description: Deregulation puts pressure on RegTech. The sector must reinvent itself and focus on strategic risk management. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Digitale abonnementen zetten mediabedrijven op groei
title: Digital subscriptions set media companies on a growth path
description: Driven by the coronavirus crisis, media companies are making a rapid digital transformation. Because of the lockdowns, media consumption has shifted faster to the internet; the number of digital subscribers to newspapers and on-demand TV services has risen sharply and consumers are buying online en masse. The increased internet traffic gives more branches in the TMT sector a chance to get off to a good start when the economy picks up again.
author: Ingrid Laane

slug: Digitale buitenreclame is bezig aan opmars
title: Digital outdoor advertising is on the rise
description: The Dutch economy is making a strong recovery compared with the previous year. The TMT sector has had a good quarter in which revenues have grown and entrepreneurs are positive. However, consumers have become more downbeat.
author: Iffat Ngoesmin
Kamalika Patra

slug: Digitale media groeien door transformatie en nieuwe kanalen
title: Digital media grow through transformation and new channels
description: Digital media are growing strongly through transformation and new channels, while traditional media are shrinking. Trends and outlook. Read more.
author: Mario Bersem

slug: Digitale soevereiniteit biedt grote kansen voor Europa
title: Digital sovereignty offers major opportunities for Europe
description: ABN AMRO: European tech grows with AI and cloud sovereignty. Privacy and independence become a competitive edge. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Directie onvoldoende betrokken bij cyberveiligheid
title: Management insufficiently involved in cyber security
description: European legislation makes management responsible for an organisation’s cyber security. Yet this awareness has not sunk in. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Duurzaamheid wordt bittere noodzaak voor softwarebedrijven
title: Sustainability is becoming a pressing necessity for software companies
description: As our society becomes ever more digital, the influence of software companies grows. They shape how we keep in touch with friends, what information we consume and how we travel. Because of that prominent role, software companies are facing closer scrutiny from both citizens and government.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Een cyberaanval kan grote gevolgen hebben
title: A cyberattack can have major consequences
description: Business operations grinding to a halt, customers walking away; a cyberattack can severely damage a company. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Eigen chip-industrie is voor Europa nog ver weg
title: Europe is still a long way from its own chip industry
description: Europe relies heavily on foreign production. Six per cent of global chip production takes place in Europe and the Middle East. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Energiereductie is een zaak van de hele cloud-keten
title: Energy reduction is a matter for the entire cloud chain
description: It is not only data centres that should be concerned with reducing emissions and energy use. In fact, the entire chain should take responsibility for a greener digital landscape.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Europa wil meedoen in de AI-race
title: Europe wants to join the AI race
description: Europe wants to get a grip on artificial intelligence, but is not yet a serious contender in the global AI race. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Europa zet in op technologische zelfredzaamheid
title: Europe aims for technological self-reliance
description: Europe wants to be less dependent on technology from the US and Asia. The road is still long, but there are hopeful signs. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Europa’s softwaremarkt op zoek naar schaal en niches
title: Europe’s software market in search of scale and niches
description: Europe’s SaaS market brims with innovation but struggles to scale. Discover the opportunities in AI SaaS and other niches.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Generatieve AI pakt rol in de duurzaamheidstransitie
title: Generative AI enters the sustainability transition
description: Generative AI can accelerate the sustainability transition in several ways, and investors see those opportunities too. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer
Cas Bogaard

slug: Het einde van het algoritme als black box
title: The end of the algorithm as a black box
description: The time when algorithms were accepted as a black box seems to be over for good. Government and society are calling ever more loudly for transparency. Algorithmic decision-making can in fact fuel inequality. The lawsuit that Uber drivers recently filed against the technology company illustrates this.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Het groeigeweld van software as a service
title: The explosive growth of software-as-a-service
description: Software-as-a-service (SaaS) is a relatively new business model for software companies, in which software is sold as an online subscription service. For several years now, ABN AMRO has successfully gained experience in financing SaaS companies.
author: Steven Peters

slug: Hulp van 5G bij verhoging arbeidsproductiviteit
title: How 5G can help raise labour productivity
description: The Netherlands faces an economic challenge. Our country is struggling with a shortage of labour while the growth of labour productivity — the added value per hour worked — is slowing. The introduction of 5G can help lift productivity further.
author: Sonny Duijn
Kasper Buiting

slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector
description: The Dutch economy continues to grow strongly and the TMT sector is benefiting. It is mainly IT companies that are showing strong growth. The sector, however, shows major differences. Read more in State of TMT - February 2018.
author: Kasper Buiting

slug: IT-branche in 2021 al ruim boven pre-coronaniveaus
title: IT sector well above pre-corona levels in 2021
description: Due to the coronavirus crisis, the Technology, Media and Telecoms sector (TMT) will shrink by 6 per cent in 2020, followed by a partial recovery. Advertising agencies are taking heavy blows as clients act more cautiously. Printers are seeing advertising print jobs disappear, also because events and trade fairs have been cancelled. These branches need more than a year to recover from the hit. For IT companies the picture is different; they feel the pain in 2020, but it is greatly softened because society has come to rely more on digital tools due to corona. This may even deliver structural benefits. Next year the IT sector will be well above pre-corona levels.
author: Ingrid Laane

slug: Internet niet alleen sneller, maar ook energiezuiniger
title: Internet not only faster, but also more energy-efficient
description: Two-thirds of Dutch households can now access ultra-fast ‘gigabit internet’, reports industry association NLconnect. This means the central government’s target for 2023 has already been met.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Meer cyberaanvallen via gestolen inloggegevens
title: More cyberattacks using stolen login details
description: Cybercriminals are increasingly starting their attack by logging in to company systems with a username and password. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Nieuwe cyberwet dwingt bedrijven tot maatregelen
title: New cyber law forces companies to take measures
description: NIS2 forces companies to assess the cyber resilience of suppliers and customers. SMEs in particular are not yet prepared. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Noodzaak voor alternatieve koeling datacenters neemt toe
title: Need for alternative cooling in data centres is increasing
description: Cooling installations at data centres in North Holland use so much water that this could locally lead to a drinking water shortage, De Telegraaf reported. Not every cooling system uses drinking water, though; there is an alternative, with many other benefits as well.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Ondernemers erkennen cyberrisico vooral pas na schade
title: Entrepreneurs recognise cyber risk mainly only after damage
description: Entrepreneurs often underestimate cyber risks. Only after an attack and the resulting damage do they recognise the risks. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Online advertentiemarkt blijft groeien
title: Online advertising market keeps growing
description: The TMT sector continues to benefit from the favourable economic climate. Business confidence is high and entrepreneurs see few obstacles. A clear divide remains between strong and weak-performing industries.
author: Kasper Buiting
Justine Vijver

slug: Online-advertentiemarkt evolueert onder maatschappelijke druk
title: Online advertising market evolves under social pressure
description: Personalised advertising is getting harder. Where is the online advertising market heading? See the explainer here.
author: Julia Krauwer
Mario Bersem

slug: Overheid eist hoofdrol op in 2018
title: Government claims lead role in 2018
description: The Technology, Media and Telecom (TMT) sector facilitates the digitalisation of the rest of the economy.
author: Kasper Buiting

slug: Phishing blijkt populaire vorm van cybercriminaliteit
title: Phishing proves a popular form of cybercrime
description: Phishing is a popular method for cybercriminals to break into companies. The method is becoming more targeted and more sophisticated. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Recordbedrag buitgemaakt met gijzelsoftware
title: Record amount extorted with ransomware
description: Installing malware is a prominent strategy used by cybercriminals to achieve their goal. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Snel doorpakken op stimuleren thuiswerken helpt klimaat
title: Act fast to promote working from home to help the climate
description: The new government plans to promote working from home to protect the environment, according to the coalition agreement. Now that part of the Netherlands is already working from home en masse under pressure from the pandemic, this has a chance of success.
author: Sonny Duijn
Franka Rolvink Couzy

slug: Softwarebedrijven nog niet klaar voor AI-agents
title: Software companies not yet ready for AI agents
description: AI agents are fundamentally changing software. What does that mean for SaaS companies? Read the full report.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Spectaculaire chatbot symbool voor AI-kloof
title: Spectacular chatbot symbol of AI divide
description: ChatGPT can handle the most diverse requests. Meanwhile, companies struggle to put AI into practice. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Stand van TMT december 2019
title: State of TMT December 2019
description: Growth in the Dutch economy is slowing and the economic indicators have worsened. The TMT sector is affected, but continues to perform relatively well.
author: Kasper Buiting

slug: Stand van TMT november 2018
title: State of TMT November 2018
description: The TMT sector continues to benefit from the favourable economic climate. Business confidence is high and entrepreneurs see few obstacles. A clear divide remains between strong and weak-performing segments.
author: Kasper Buiting

slug: Tech zonder Google kan Europa het zelf
title: Tech without Google: can Europe do it itself?
description: How can Europe become more digitally independent? Discover the risks and opportunities of digital sovereignty in this episode of Achter de Cijfers.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Tech-ondernemers laveren tussen ambitie en beperking
title: Tech entrepreneurs navigate between ambition and constraint
description: Europe is known for its strong regulation, but for fast-growing technology companies it rarely works to their advantage. Read more.
author: Julia Krauwer

slug: Van 5G tot stikstofschade tien themas van 2020
title: From 5G to nitrogen damage: ten themes for 2020
description: Legislation, consumer behaviour, sustainability. An entrepreneur has to keep many plates spinning at once. Having a good game strategy may be more important than ever in 2020. Our sector specialists already provide insight and background on ten themes that will affect companies and entire industries next year.
author: Sonny Duijn

slug: Verduurzaming IT heeft duw in de rug nodig
title: Sustainable IT needs a push
description: Despite rapidly growing attention to energy saving and climate change, IT sustainability is not yet embraced across the board. A minority of IT decision-makers (35 per cent) include sustainability as a purchasing criterion. This emerges from research by ABN AMRO in collaboration with PanelWizard among 588 IT decision-makers from companies across all sectors.
author: Julia Krauwer
Ingrid Laane
Kamalika Patra

slug: Wrange nasmaak dreigt door blinde 5G-veiling
title: A bitter aftertaste looms from a blind 5G auction
description: The government is considering partially ‘blind’ auctioning the 3.5 gigahertz 5G frequency next year. It hopes this will channel higher proceeds into the treasury. High frequency costs, however, mean less room for necessary network investment. That could hinder the growth of the Dutch economy and the circular transition.
author: Kamalika Patra

slug: Zonder de juiste cijfers blijft groene IT een illusie
title: Without the right figures, green IT remains an illusion
description: Cloud companies are not sharing all the information IT teams need to go green. Read more in this article.
author: Julia Krauwer
